message:
beads: file frankenjax-l5hb (harden sort/argsort stride arithmetic)

File a follow-up bead in the same family as frankenjax-fuvh (split
overflow hardening, closed earlier today) and frankenjax-lbjo
(broadcast_in_dim empty-shape strides, closed yesterday):

- frankenjax-l5hb "Harden sort and argsort stride arithmetic"
  status=in_progress, priority=2, type=task

Description (verbatim from the bead):
"sort/argsort still compute non-empty row-major strides and flat
offsets with unchecked usize arithmetic. Harden the path while
preserving existing empty-tensor behavior and add targeted
coverage."

This is the next step in the workspace-wide sweep replacing
unchecked stride/offset arithmetic in fj-lax primitives with
checked_shape_element_count / checked_row_major_strides /
checked_mul / checked_add helpers, so pathological inputs like
Shape{ dims: vec![0, u32::MAX, ...] } return a typed
EvalError::Unsupported instead of either silently wrapping
(release) or panicking on overflow (debug).

Filing only — no source change in this commit. Implementation
will follow under the same bead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
